---
title: "Open Science"
---

<div class="page">

# Open Science

I am committed to open, reproducible research. All code, data, and software developed as part of my research is publicly available unless otherwise noted.

---

## GitHub Repositories

- [**rodaguayo**](https://github.com/rodaguayo/) — Main GitHub profile with research code repositories
- **OGGM workflow contributions** — Open Global Glacier Model development and Patagonia-specific configurations

## Open Datasets

Five open datasets published on Zenodo (see [Datasets page](datasets.qmd) for full list), including the PatagoniaMet hydrometeorological dataset.

## Reproducible Workflows

- All glacier modelling workflows are documented and version-controlled
- Hybrid glacio-hydrological modelling framework used in Western Patagonia studies
- Deep learning pipeline for glacier buffering analysis (ICE-BUFFER project)

## Software

- **OGGM** — Contributor to the Open Global Glacier Model Python package
- Patagonia-specific glacier modelling configurations and calibration workflows
- Hydrological data processing and quality control pipelines

---

## Principles

- All publications include data availability statements with Zenodo DOIs
- Code repositories linked from publications where applicable
- Open access publications prioritized

</div>
